instructions: Use this before applying. Prioritize jobs with 7+ points.

questions.text: Pay is $19/hr or higher, or salary is $40K+
Mentions A+, Per Scholas, Google IT, or entry-level IT
Mentions ticketing, Windows, M365, remote support, or troubleshooting
Training is paid and equipment is provided

applyImmediatelyIf: The role is $19+, entry-level, mentions technical/customer support, accepts customer service experience, and does not require 3+ years of IT.
skipIf: It pays under $19, is commission-only, requires unpaid training, or asks you to buy equipment.
